title: Scenario-Based Modeling Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of creating and refining scenario-based models, such as use cases, to capture software requirements.
relationships: Process flow starting with Identify Actors, leading to Develop Use Cases, then branching to Create Activity Diagram and Build Swimlane Diagram in parallel, which both feed into Refine Requirements, creating an iterative loop back to the start
